response.justification: Strong match with all core requirements met. The candidate brings 6+ years of full-stack experience with deep expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React). Currently working on AI agent infrastructure and MCP at Staff level—exactly the type of work this role requires. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Kubernetes, and specific testing framework mentions, but these are minor given the demonstrated architectural capability and Node.js foundation.
strengths: Active AI agent development experience at current role (MCP code generators, agentic workflows)—directly addresses a key requirement
Strong primary stack alignment: TypeScript, Node.js, React across multiple roles with recent full-stack work at Acme
Deep software craftsmanship and testing mindset—TDD emphasized throughout career, multiple testing-focused workshops and projects
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite Node.js expertise—framework specifics would need quick ramp
Kubernetes not documented; Docker setup experience present but K8s listed as requirement
Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly named, though strong TDD background suggests familiarity
